volatility.note: Confirmed regime transition HIGH→NORMAL. Second consecutive day below 26.

sentiment.fear_greed_note: Third consecutive day at extreme fear. Money Morning reports single-digit readings recently. Historical pattern: single-digit F&G marked significant bottoms in April 2025 and November 2025.

wti_crude.note: WTI broke below $100 psychological level. War premium ~70% unwound. Iran ceasefire catalyst.

brent_crude.note: Brent down from March peak of $115. Goldman raised forecast to $110 avg through April.

gold.note: Rising alongside equities - unusual. Goldman $5400 EOY target. Central bank buying 60 tonnes/month.

treasuries.note: Rising yields with rising equities = risk-on. 30Y near 5.0% potential equity ceiling.

adp_jobs.note: Goldilocks: resilient but cooling. Not hot enough to hike, not cold enough to panic.

catalysts: Trump: US forces leave Iran in 2-3 weeks
LLY: FDA approved GLP-1 pill for weight loss
OpenAI funding: Nvidia, Amazon, SoftBank backing
ORCL: cutting jobs for AI data center investment

gex_assessment.dealer_positioning: Dealers completed short-gamma-to-neutral transition. VIX settling at 23.77 confirms. Positive gamma engagement above $656-660 would accelerate upside.
gex_assessment.note: Estimated from price action and vol regime. No direct GEX feed available.

market_regime.note: Iran ceasefire hopes. VIX crushing. Extreme fear contrarian bullish. Oil below $100. Two consecutive V-shaped reversals.
